calendar.matters:
Motion To Apportion Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Sep-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled the day for Motion to Apportion Settlement Funds.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jeffrey Wehr, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Mary Lou Morales and Steven Morales, and with plaintiff Cynthia Padilla, who was placed under oath and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the heirs of decedent Raymond Morales are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying survival, and wrongful death action, in the following proportions:

Estate of Raymond Morales - 0%
Mary Lou Morales - 50%
Cynthia Padilla - 50%
Steven Morales - 0%

Attorneys' Fees - $1,001.00.
Balance - $283,642.45.

Any future net settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall submit a proposed order to the Court no later than September 16, 2008.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
